item.title: Why You Shouldn’t Speak to the Manager
item.description: A simple dealership tip: why speaking to the manager is not always the best move when buying a car. What approach can help you get better pricing and a smoother experience?

media:content.media:title: Why You Shouldn’t Speak to the Manager
media:content.media:description: A simple dealership tip: why speaking to the manager is not always the best move when buying a car. What approach can help you get better pricing and a smoother experience?

item.title: Mistaken Identity: A Camaro Mix-Up
item.description: A car owner thinks they found their stolen Camaro, only to realize it was not the right one. What clues help confirm a vehicle’s identity in situations like this?

media:content.media:title: Mistaken Identity: A Camaro Mix-Up
media:content.media:description: A car owner thinks they found their stolen Camaro, only to realize it was not the right one. What clues help confirm a vehicle’s identity in situations like this?

item.title: Treat Car Buying Like Your Health
item.description: A practical look at car buying with a focus on saving money, understanding pricing, and making smarter dealership decisions. What should shoppers watch for before they buy?

media:content.media:title: Treat Car Buying Like Your Health
media:content.media:description: A practical look at car buying with a focus on saving money, understanding pricing, and making smarter dealership decisions. What should shoppers watch for before they buy?

item.title: Should Customers Remove These Car Accessories?
item.description: A quick look at a common dealership question about whether customers should take these off. What do you think drivers should keep in mind before buying or modifying a vehicle?

media:content.media:title: Should Customers Remove These Car Accessories?
media:content.media:description: A quick look at a common dealership question about whether customers should take these off. What do you think drivers should keep in mind before buying or modifying a vehicle?

item.title: Why You Should Wait Until 30 Days Before Buying
item.description: A breakdown of timing strategies in the car buying process, focusing on how waiting closer to the purchase date can impact pricing and negotiation outcomes. The video explores market timing, inventory, and buyer leverage. When do you think is the best time to buy a car?

media:content.media:title: Why You Should Wait Until 30 Days Before Buying
media:content.media:description: A breakdown of timing strategies in the car buying process, focusing on how waiting closer to the purchase date can impact pricing and negotiation outcomes. The video explores market timing, inventory, and buyer leverage. When do you think is the best time to buy a car?

item.title: A Trade-In That Stood Out for the Wrong Reasons
item.description: A dealership trade-in that didn’t go as expected, highlighting issues uncovered during inspection and appraisal. The video explores condition concerns and how they affected the vehicle’s value. What do you think matters most in a trade-in evaluation?

media:content.media:title: A Trade-In That Stood Out for the Wrong Reasons
media:content.media:description: A dealership trade-in that didn’t go as expected, highlighting issues uncovered during inspection and appraisal. The video explores condition concerns and how they affected the vehicle’s value. What do you think matters most in a trade-in evaluation?

item.title: C8 Corvette Ride Along in Kentucky
item.description: A quick Corvette C8 clip from Kentucky with a reply to a viewer comment. It highlights the car and the moment without extra commentary. What stands out most about the C8?

media:content.media:title: C8 Corvette Ride Along in Kentucky
media:content.media:description: A quick Corvette C8 clip from Kentucky with a reply to a viewer comment. It highlights the car and the moment without extra commentary. What stands out most about the C8?

item.title: Reply to a viewer about a Ford Mustang
item.description: A reply to a viewer about a Ford Mustang and why it would not be sold to just anyone. What makes this one worth keeping?

media:content.media:title: Reply to a viewer about a Ford Mustang
media:content.media:description: A reply to a viewer about a Ford Mustang and why it would not be sold to just anyone. What makes this one worth keeping?
